title: Peradix Wooden Chess Set, 19" Large Foldable Chess Board Game with 3.75" King & 2 Extra Queens, Professional Classic Chess Set for Adults and Kids
features: ♚【Upgraded Large Chess Set 】48x48cm Foldable wooden board with 3.75" king, elegant classic design, hours of fun and strategy for kids and adults, perfect gift for birthdays, parties, and chess lovers!

♛【Weighted, Upgraded Chess Pieces】Features 3.75" kings and 2 extra queens for a grand, professional feel. The weighted wooden pieces make every move satisfying and stable. Note: Chess pieces are not magnetic.

♝【Wooden Handmade Chess】Each piece and the board are handcrafted from high-quality wood, providing excellent durability and moisture resistance. Velvet bases protect the board from scratches and noise, and the perfectly sized pieces make every move smooth and satisfying.
♞【Easy-to-Store Folding Board】Folds neatly into a compact chess box with designated slots for each piece, keeping them secure, quiet, and organized. Stylish and elegant for any chess lover!

♜【Perfect Gift】This classic chess set is a favorite for Christmas, birthdays, or New Year’s gifts. Great for kids and adults alike, it boosts mental agility, sharpens thinking, and encourages focus—all while having fun!
